faqs.question: Why are silverfish common in Union City homes?
faqs.answer: Union City's humid climate, older building stock, and proximity to the Hudson River create moisture-rich environments where silverfish thrive. These pests are attracted to damp basements, bathrooms, and areas with poor ventilation common in many Union City residences.
